mapper.sql: SELECT v.group_code AS groupCode , v.group_name AS groupName , v.code_value AS codeValue , v.code_name AS codeName , v.order_no AS orderNo FROM ( VALUES ('WORSHIP_TYPE', '예배구분', 'SUNDAY', '주일예배', 10), ('WORSHIP_TYPE', '예배구분', 'WEDNESDAY', '수요예배', 20), ('WORSHIP_TYPE', '예배구분', 'DAWN', '새벽예배', 30), ('WORSHIP_TYPE', '예배구분', 'SPECIAL', '특별예배', 40) ) AS v(group_code, group_name, code_value, code_name, order_no)
